sections.paragraph:
εὐλογητός, ή, όν (s. prec. and next entry) in our lit. only (as predom. LXX; cp. also En 22:14; TestSol, JosAs, ParJer; Herm. Wr. 1, 32 εὐλογητὸς εἶ πάτερ) of God (and Christ) εὐ. κύριος ὁ θεὸς τ. Ἰσραήλ (3 Km 1:48; 2 Ch 2:11; 6:4; Ps 71:18), blessed, praised Lk 1:68 (PVielhauer, ZTK 49, ’52, 255–72; AVanhoye, Structure du ‘Benedictus’, NTS 12, ’66, 382–89; UMittman-Richert, Magnifikat und Benediktus ’96). εὐ. εἰς τ. αἰῶνας (Ps 88:53; 40:14) Ro 1:25; 9:5; 2 Cor 11:31; cp. 1:3; Eph 1:3; 1 Pt 1:3; B 6:10; IEph 1:3 (on formulation of praise s. Elbogen 4f and PSchorlemmer, ‘Die Hochkirche’ 1924, 110ff; 151). Of Christ MPol 14:1. ὁ εὐ. as periphrasis for the name of God, which is not mentioned out of reverence Mk 14:61 (Dalman, Worte 163f).—EBishop, IGoldziher Memorial I ’49, 82–88; SEsh, Der Heilige (Er Sei Gepriesen) ’57.—DELG s.v. λέγω. TW.

prec. prec. = preceding

lit. lit. = literal(ly); literature (refererences to [scholarly] literature)

predom. predom. = predominant(ly)

LXX LXX = Septuaginta, ed. ARahlfs, unless otherwise specified—Lists 2, beg.

  1. cp. = compare, freq. in ref. to citation fr. ancient texts

En En = I Enoch—List 2

TestSol TestSol = Testament of Solomon, I–III a.d.—List 2

JosAs JosAs = Joseph and Aseneth—Lists 2, 5

ParJer ParJer = Paraleipomena Jeremiou, II? a.d.—List 2

Herm. Wr. Herm. Wr. = Hermetic Writings—List 5

ZTK ZTK = Zeitschrift für Theologie und Kirche—List 6

NTS NTS = New Testament Studies—List 6

B B = Barnabas (the Letter of), II a.d., except in series of uncial witnesses, in which case B refers to Codex Vaticanus (s. also Vat.). When the abbrv. B would ambiguous, Vat. is used for the codex.—List 1

IEph IEph = Ignatius to the Ephesians—List 1

Elbogen Elbogen = IE., Der jüd. Gottesdienst—List 6

MPol MPol = Martyrdom of Polycarp; after II a.d.—List 1

Dalman Dalman = GD., various works—List 6

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

TW TW = Theologisches Wörterbuch zum NT; tr. GBromiley, Theological Dictionary of the NT—List 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 408
